utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Reviewing the final property solution: (1) property — fully detailed with price, type, location, and description; (2) financing — includes purchase method, down payment, fees, interest rate, term, and details; (3) legal_services — includes service name, type, and cost; (4) moving_services — includes service level, cost, currency, and packing info; (5) setup_services — includes utility package, cost, currency, and list of services; (6) total_budget — includes breakdown of all costs and grand total. Every required item is present and fully specified with appropriate details and numerical values.
